sentences.target: J'attends mon pote devant le métro.

translations.fr: J'attends mon pote devant le métro.
translations.en: I'm waiting for my friend by the metro.
translations.es: Estoy esperando a mi amigo frente al metro.
translations.de: Ich warte vor der U-Bahn-Station auf meinen Kumpel.
translations.it: Aspetto il mio amico davanti alla metro.
translations.ko: 지하철 입구 앞에서 친구를 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在地铁口等我的朋友。
translations.yue: 我喺地鐵站門口等我朋友。
translations.ru: Я жду своего друга у метро.
translations.pt: Estou esperando meu amigo na entrada do metrô.
translations.he: אני מחכה לחבר שלי ליד הרכבת התחתית.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi bạn tôi ở trước ga tàu điện ngầm.
translations.ar: أنا أنتظر صديقي عند مدخل المترو.
translations.nl: Ik wacht op mijn vriend bij de metro.
translations.uk: Я чекаю на свого друга біля метро.
translations.hu: A metró bejáratánál várom a haveromat.
translations.hi: मैं मेट्रो के बाहर अपने दोस्त का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Περιμένω τον φίλο μου έξω από το μετρό.
translations.nb: Jeg venter på kompisen min ved T-banen.
translations.id: Aku menunggu temanku di depan stasiun metro.
translations.sv: Jag väntar på min kompis vid tunnelbanan.
translations.ro: Îl aștept pe prietenul meu în fața metroului.
translations.da: Jeg venter på min ven ved metroen.
translations.ja: 駅の入り口で友だちを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun je, elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular, modifying pote.
Colloquial noun meaning friend/buddy; here likely masculine due to mon.
Preposition introducing the location phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular, for métro.
Common noun meaning subway/metro.

sentences.target: Tu viens avec ta pote demain.

translations.fr: Tu viens avec ta pote demain.
translations.en: You're coming with your friend tomorrow.
translations.de: Morgen kommst du mit deiner Freundin.
translations.it: Domani vieni con la tua amica.
translations.ko: 내일 네 친구랑 같이 올 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 你明天和你的朋友一起来。
translations.yue: 你聽日同你朋友一齊嚟。
translations.ru: Ты завтра придёшь со своей подругой.
translations.pt: Amanhã você vem com sua amiga.
translations.he: אתה בא מחר עם החברה שלך.
translations.vi: Ngày mai bạn đi cùng bạn mình.
translations.nl: Morgen kom je met je vriendin.
translations.uk: Ти завтра прийдеш зі своєю подругою.
translations.hi: तुम कल अपनी दोस्त के साथ आ रहे हो.
translations.el: Αύριο έρχεσαι με τη φίλη σου.
translations.nb: I morgen kommer du sammen med venninnen din.
translations.sv: I morgon kommer du med din tjejkompis.
translations.da: I morgen kommer du sammen med din veninde.
translations.ja: 明日、友だちと一緒に来ます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Preposition meaning with.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), feminine singular, modifying pote.
Colloquial noun meaning friend; here feminine due to ta.
Adverb of time indicating the event occurs the next day.

translations.en: Their friend works at the café.
translations.es: Su amiga trabaja en la cafetería.
translations.it: La sua amica lavora al bar.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们的朋友在咖啡馆工作。
translations.yue: 佢嘅朋友喺咖啡店做嘢。
translations.pt: A amiga deles trabalha no café.
translations.vi: Bạn của họ làm việc ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Hun vriendin werkt in het café.
translations.hi: उनकी दोस्त कैफ़े में काम करती है.
translations.el: Η φίλη τους δουλεύει στο καφέ.
translations.ja: 彼らの友だちはカフェで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person), feminine singular; agrees with pote; possessor's gender is unspecified.
Colloquial noun meaning friend (feminine here).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Contraction of à + le; preposition meaning at/to with a masculine singular article.
Common noun meaning cafe/coffee shop.

sentences.target: On mange chez ma pote ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ mɑ̃ʒ ʃe ma pɔt sə swaʁ./

translations.fr: On mange chez ma pote ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ mɑ̃ʒ ʃe ma pɔt sə swaʁ./
translations.en: We're eating at my friend's place tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche cenamos en casa de mi amiga.
translations.de: Wir essen heute Abend bei meiner Freundin.
translations.it: Stasera mangiamo a casa della mia amica.
translations.ko: 오늘 저녁에 내 친구 집에서 먹어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今晚在我朋友家吃饭。
translations.yue: 我哋今晚喺我朋友屋企食嘢。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером мы ужинаем у моей подруги.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos comer na casa da minha amiga.
translations.he: הערב אנחנו אוכלים אצל החברה שלי.
translations.tr: Bu akşam arkadaşımın evinde yemek yiyoruz.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi ăn ở nhà bạn tôi.
translations.nl: Vanavond eten we bij mijn vriendin.
translations.uk: Ми сьогодні ввечері їмо в домі моєї подруги.
translations.hi: आज रात हम मेरी दोस्त के घर खाना खाएँगे.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem jemy u mojej koleżanki.
translations.el: Το βράδυ τρώμε στο σπίτι της φίλης μου.
translations.nb: I kveld spiser vi hos venninnen min.
translations.id: Malam ini kami makan di rumah temanku.
translations.sv: Ikväll äter vi hos min kompis.
translations.cs: Dnes večer jíme u mojí kamarádky.
translations.da: I aften spiser vi hos min veninde.
translations.ja: 今夜は友だちの家で食べます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun often used for we; takes 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with on).
Preposition meaning at the home/place of.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), feminine singular, modifying pote.
Colloquial noun meaning friend (feminine here).
Demonstrative determiner modifying soir in a time expression.
Common noun meaning evening; forms the temporal expression ce soir.
